heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–230, title I, § 143(b)84 Stat. 151Apr. 13, 1970
label: 333 to 337 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–230, title I, § 143(b)84 Stat. 151Apr. 13, 1970
notes: Section 333, , , provided for establishment of a National Advisory Committee on Education in the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare.act July 26, 1954, ch. 577, § 168 Stat. 533

Section 334, , , provided for composition of the National Advisory Committee on Education, term of office, and ex officio membership of the Commissioner of Education.act July 26, 1954, ch. 577, § 268 Stat. 533
Section 335, , , required minimum of three meetings each calendar year.act July 26, 1954, ch. 577, § 368 Stat. 534
Section 336, , , authorized National Advisory Committee to make recommendations, appoint consultants, and submit an annual report to Congress.act July 26, 1954, ch. 577, § 468 Stat. 534
Section 337, , , authorized travel expenses and per diem payments but denied compensation to members of the National Advisory Committee.act July 26, 1954, ch. 577, § 568 Stat. 534
Sections 333 to 337 were generally superseded by provisions of providing for a National Council on Quality in Education.section 868 of this title
